message:
chore(beads): sync .beads/issues.jsonl after closing cc-redis bead wave

Closes (all landed in prior commits on main/master):

  - frankenredis-v4x3 (212bcb8)  WrongSubcommandArity wording
  - frankenredis-j4vq (243c8f4)  FUNCTION STATS test flip
  - frankenredis-ea1j (a1320b7)  5 clippy lints + cascade drift
  - frankenredis-joae (70c6138)  fr-protocol golden harness expansion
  - frankenredis-oayf (c6e3090)  sentinel-failover tmp redis.conf
  - frankenredis-euqm (7c048ee)  OBJECT ENCODING conformance matrix

Plus carries over upstream JSONL rewrites performed by other agents'
br syncs during the session. Leaving 10 P1 beads open (v8s5, jsr7,
fcjh, b6ka, 1749, s5su, jqgv, rv89, 5pnv, 0zyf).
